translations.text: The upper altar shall be four cubits; and from the altar hearth and upward there shall be four horns.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The altar hearth shall be twelve cubits long by twelve wide, square in its four sides.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The ledge shall be fourteen cubits long by fourteen wide in its four sides; and the border about it shall be half a cubit; and its bottom shall be a cubit around; and its steps shall look toward the east.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to me, Son of man, thus says the Lord Yahweh: These are the ordinances of the altar in the day when they shall make it, to offer burnt offerings on it, and to sprinkle blood on it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall give to the priests the Levites who are of the offspring  of Zadok, who are near to me, to minister to me, says the Lord Yahweh, a young bull for a sin offering.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall take of its blood, and put it on the four horns of it, and on the four corners of the ledge, and on the border all around: thus you shall cleanse it and make atonement for it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall also take the bull of the sin offering, and it shall be burned in the appointed place of the house, outside of the sanctuary.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: On the second day you shall offer a male goat without defect for a sin offering; and they shall cleanse the altar, as they cleansed it with the bull.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When you have finished cleansing it, you shall offer a young bull without defect, and a ram out of the flock without defect.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall bring them near to Yahweh, and the priests shall cast salt on them, and they shall offer them up for a burnt offering to Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Seven days you shall prepare every day a goat for a sin offering: they shall also prepare a young bull, and a ram out of the flock, without defect.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Seven days shall they make atonement for the altar and purify it; so shall they consecrate it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they have accomplished the days, it shall be that on the eighth day, and forward, the priests shall make your burnt offerings on the altar, and your peace offerings; and I will accept you, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he brought me back by the way of the outer gate of the sanctuary, which looks toward the east; and it was shut.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh said to me, This gate shall be shut; it shall not be opened, neither shall any man enter in by it; for Yahweh, the God of Israel, has entered in by it; therefore it shall be shut.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for the prince, he shall sit therein as prince to eat bread before Yahweh; he shall enter by the way of the porch of the gate, and shall go out by the way of the same.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he brought me by the way of the north gate before the house; and I looked, and behold, Yahweh’s glory filled Yahweh’s house: and I fell on my face.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh said to me, Son of man, mark well, and see with your eyes, and hear with your ears all that I tell you concerning all the ordinances of Yahweh’s house, and all its laws; and mark well the entrance of the house, with every exit of the sanctuary.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall tell the rebellious, even to the house of Israel, Thus says the Lord Yahweh: you house of Israel, let it suffice you of all your abominations,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in that you have brought in foreigners, uncircumcised in heart and uncircumcised in flesh, to be in my sanctuary, to profane it, even my house, when you offer my bread, the fat and the blood, and they have broken my covenant, to add to all your abominations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have not performed the duty of my holy things; but you have set performers of my duty in my sanctuary for yourselves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh, No foreigner, uncircumcised in heart and uncircumcised in flesh, shall enter into my sanctuary, of any foreigners who are among the children of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the Levites who went far from me, when Israel went astray, who went astray from me after their idols, they shall bear their iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yet they shall be ministers in my sanctuary, having oversight at the gates of the house, and ministering in the house: they shall kill the burnt offering and the sacrifice for the people, and they shall stand before them to minister to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because they ministered to them before their idols, and became a stumbling block of iniquity to the house of Israel; therefore I have lifted up my hand against them, says the Lord Yahweh, and they shall bear their iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall not come near to me, to execute the office of priest to me, nor to come near to any of my holy things, to the things that are most holy; but they shall bear their shame, and their abominations which they have committed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yet will I make them performers of the duty of the house, for all its service, and for all that shall be done therein.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the priests the Levites, the sons of Zadok, who performed the duty of my sanctuary when the children of Israel went astray from me, they shall come near to me to minister to me; and they shall stand before me to offer to me the fat and the blood, says the Lord Yahweh:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: they shall enter into my sanctuary, and they shall come near to my table, to minister to me, and they shall keep my instruction.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall be that, when they enter in at the gates of the inner court, they shall be clothed with linen garments; and no wool shall come on them, while they minister in the gates of the inner court, and within.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall have linen tires on their heads, and shall have linen breeches on their waists; they shall not clothe themselves with anything that makes them sweat.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When they go out into the outer court, even into the outer court to the people, they shall put off their garments in which they minister, and lay them in the holy rooms; and they shall put on other garments, that they not sanctify the people with their garments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Neither shall they shave their heads, nor allow their locks to grow long; they shall only cut off the hair of their heads.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Neither shall any of the priests drink wine, when they enter into the inner court.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Neither shall they take for their wives a widow, nor her who is put away; but they shall take virgins of the offspring  of the house of Israel, or a widow who is the widow of a priest.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall teach my people the difference between the holy and the common, and cause them to discern between the unclean and the clean.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In a controversy they shall stand to judge; according to my ordinances shall they judge it: and they shall keep my laws and my statutes in all my appointed feasts; and they shall make my Sabbaths holy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall go in to no dead person to defile themselves; but for father, or for mother, or for son, or for daughter, for brother, or for sister who has had no husband, they may defile themselves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: After he is cleansed, they shall reckon to him seven days.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the day that he goes into the sanctuary, into the inner court, to minister in the sanctuary, he shall offer his sin offering, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall have an inheritance: I am their inheritance; and you shall give them no possession in Israel; I am their possession.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall eat the meal offering, and the sin offering, and the trespass offering; and every devoted thing in Israel shall be theirs.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The first of all the first fruits of every thing, and every offering of everything, of all your offerings, shall be for the priest: you shall also give to the priests the first of your dough, to cause a blessing to rest on your house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The priests shall not eat of anything that dies of itself, or is torn, whether it is bird or animal.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moreover, when you shall divide by lot the land for inheritance, you shall offer an offering to Yahweh, a holy portion of the land; the length shall be the length of twenty-five thousand reeds, and the width shall be ten thousand: it shall be holy in all its border all around.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of this there shall be a five hundred by five hundred square for the holy place; and fifty cubits  for its suburbs all around.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of this measure you shall measure a length of twenty-five thousand, and a width of ten thousand: and in it shall be the sanctuary, which is most holy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is a holy portion of the land; it shall be for the priests, the ministers of the sanctuary, who come near to minister to Yahweh; and it shall be a place for their houses, and a holy place for the sanctuary.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Twenty-five thousand in length, and ten thousand in width, shall be to the Levites, the ministers of the house, for a possession to themselves, for twenty rooms.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall appoint the possession of the city five thousand wide, and twenty-five thousand long, side by side with the offering of the holy portion: it shall be for the whole house of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What is for the prince shall be on the one side and on the other side of the holy offering and of the possession of the city, in front of the holy offering and in front of the possession of the city, on the west side westward, and on the east side eastward; and in length answerable to one of the portions, from the west border to the east border.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the land it shall be to him for a possession in Israel: and my princes shall no more oppress my people; but they shall give the land to the house of Israel according to their tribes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh: Let it suffice you, princes of Israel: remove violence and plunder, and execute justice and righteousness; dispossessing my people, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall have just balances, and a just ephah,  and a just bath.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The ephah and the bath shall be of one measure, that the bath may contain one tenth of a homer,  and the ephah one tenth of a homer: its measure shall be after the homer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The shekel  shall be twenty gerahs.  Twenty shekels plus twenty-five shekels plus fifteen shekels shall be your mina.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the offering that you shall offer: the sixth part of an ephah from a homer of wheat; and you shall give the sixth part of an ephah from a homer of barley;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and the set portion of oil, of the bath of oil, one tenth of a bath out of the cor, which is ten baths, even a homer; (for ten baths are a homer;)

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and one lamb of the flock, out of two hundred, from the well-watered pastures of Israel — for a meal offering, and for a burnt offering, and for peace offerings, to make atonement for them, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the people of the land shall give to this offering for the prince in Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall be the prince’s part to give the burnt offerings, and the meal offerings, and the drink offerings, in the feasts, and on the new moons, and on the Sabbaths, in all the appointed feasts of the house of Israel: he shall prepare the sin offering, and the meal offering, and the burnt offering, and the peace offerings, to make atonement for the house of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh: In the first month, in the first day of the month, you shall take a young bull without defect; and you shall cleanse the sanctuary.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The priest shall take of the blood of the sin offering, and put it on the door posts of the house, and on the four corners of the ledge of the altar, and on the posts of the gate of the inner court.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So you shall do on the seventh day of the month for everyone who errs, and for him who is simple: so you shall make atonement for the house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the first month, in the fourteenth day of the month, you shall have the Passover, a feast of seven days; unleavened bread shall be eaten.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: On that day shall the prince prepare for himself and for all the people of the land a bull for a sin offering.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The seven days of the feast he shall prepare a burnt offering to Yahweh, seven bulls and seven rams without defect daily the seven days; and a male goat daily for a sin offering.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He shall prepare a meal offering, an ephah  for a bull, and an ephah for a ram, and a hin of oil to an ephah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the seventh month, in the fifteenth day of the month, in the feast, shall he do the like the seven days; according to the sin offering, according to the burnt offering, and according to the meal offering, and according to the oil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh: The gate of the inner court that looks toward the east shall be shut the six working days; but on the Sabbath day it shall be opened, and on the day of the new moon it shall be opened.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The prince shall enter by the way of the porch of the gate outside, and shall stand by the post of the gate; and the priests shall prepare his burnt offering and his peace offerings, and he shall worship at the threshold of the gate: then he shall go out; but the gate shall not be shut until the evening.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The people of the land shall worship at the door of that gate before Yahweh on the Sabbaths and on the new moons.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The burnt offering that the prince shall offer to Yahweh shall be on the Sabbath day six lambs without defect and a ram without defect;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and the meal offering shall be an ephah for the ram, and the meal offering for the lambs as he is able to give, and a hin of oil to an ephah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: On the day of the new moon it shall be a young bull without defect, and six lambs, and a ram; they shall be without defect:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and he shall prepare a meal offering, an ephah for the bull, and an ephah for the ram, and for the lambs according as he is able, and a hin of oil to an ephah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the prince shall enter, he shall go in by the way of the porch of the gate, and he shall go out by its way.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But when the people of the land shall come before Yahweh in the appointed feasts, he who enters by the way of the north gate to worship shall go out by the way of the south gate; and he who enters by the way of the south gate shall go out by the way of the north gate: he shall not return by the way of the gate by which he came in, but shall go out straight before him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The prince shall go in with them when they go in; and when they go out, he shall go out.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the feasts and in the solemnities the meal offering shall be an ephah  for a bull, and an ephah for a ram, and for the lambs as he is able to give, and a hin of oil to an ephah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the prince shall prepare a freewill offering, a burnt offering or peace offerings as a freewill offering to Yahweh, one shall open for him the gate that looks toward the east; and he shall prepare his burnt offering and his peace offerings, as he does on the Sabbath day: then he shall go out; and after his going out one shall shut the gate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall prepare a lamb a year old without defect for a burnt offering to Yahweh daily: morning by morning you shall prepare it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall prepare a meal offering with it morning by morning, the sixth part of an ephah,  and the third part of a hin of oil, to moisten the fine flour; a meal offering to Yahweh continually by a perpetual ordinance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus shall they prepare the lamb, and the meal offering, and the oil, morning by morning, for a continual burnt offering.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh: If the prince give a gift to any of his sons, it is his inheritance, it shall belong to his sons; it is their possession by inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But if he give of his inheritance a gift to one of his servants, it shall be his to the year of liberty; then it shall return to the prince; but as for his inheritance, it shall be for his sons.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moreover the prince shall not take of the people’s inheritance, to thrust them out of their possession; he shall give inheritance to his sons out of his own possession, that my people not be scattered every man from his possession.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he brought me through the entry, which was at the side of the gate, into the holy rooms for the priests, which looked toward the north: and behold, there was a place on the hinder part westward.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to me, This is the place where the priests shall boil the trespass offering and the sin offering, and where they shall bake the meal offering; that they not bring them out into the outer court, to sanctify the people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he brought me out into the outer court, and caused me to pass by the four corners of the court; and behold, in every corner of the court there was a court.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the four corners of the court there were courts enclosed, forty cubits  long and thirty wide: these four in the corners were of one measure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There was a wall around in them, around the four, and boiling places were made under the walls all around.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he said to me, These are the boiling houses, where the ministers of the house shall boil the sacrifice of the people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He brought me back to the door of the house; and behold, waters issued out from under the threshold of the house eastward; (for the forefront of the house was toward the east;) and the waters came down from under, from the right side of the house, on the south of the altar.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he brought me out by the way of the gate northward, and led me round by the way outside to the outer gate, by the way of the gate that looks toward the east; and behold, there ran out waters on the right side.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When the man went out eastward with the line in his hand, he measured one thousand cubits,  and he caused me to pass through the waters, waters that were to the ankles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Again he measured one thousand, and caused me to pass through the waters, waters that were to the knees. Again he measured one thousand, and caused me to pass through waters that were to the waist.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Afterward he measured one thousand; and it was a river that I could not pass through; for the waters were risen, waters to swim in, a river that could not be passed through.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He said to me, Son of man, have you seen? Then he brought me, and caused me to return to the bank of the river.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now when I had returned, behold, on the bank of the river were very many trees on the one side and on the other.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he said to me, These waters flow out toward the eastern region, and will go down into the Arabah; and they will go toward the sea; and flow into the sea which will be made to flow out; and the waters will be healed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall happen, that every living creature which swarms, in every place where the rivers come, shall live; and there shall be a very great multitude of fish; for these waters have come there, and the waters of the sea shall be healed, and everything shall live wherever the river comes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall happen, that fishermen shall stand by it: from En Gedi even to En Eglaim shall be a place for the spreading of nets; their fish shall be after their kinds, as the fish of the great sea, exceeding many.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But the miry places of it, and its marshes, shall not be healed; they shall be given up to salt.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the river on its bank, on this side and on that side, shall grow every tree for food, whose leaf shall not wither, neither shall its fruit fail: it shall produce new fruit every month, because its waters issue out of the sanctuary; and its fruit shall be for food, and its leaf for healing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus says the Lord Yahweh: This shall be the border, by which you shall divide the land for inheritance according to the twelve tribes of Israel: Joseph shall have two portions.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall inherit it, one as well as another; for I swore to give it to your fathers: and this land shall fall to you for inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This shall be the border of the land: On the north side, from the great sea, by the way of Hethlon, to the entrance of Zedad;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hamath, Berothah, Sibraim, which is between the border of Damascus and the border of Hamath; Hazer Hatticon, which is by the border of Hauran.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The border from the sea, shall be Hazar Enon at the border of Damascus; and on the north northward is the border of Hamath. This is the north side.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The east side, between Hauran and Damascus and Gilead, and the land of Israel, shall be the Jordan; from the north border to the east sea you shall measure. This is the east side.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The south side southward shall be from Tamar as far as the waters of Meriboth Kadesh, to the brook, to the great sea. This is the south side southward.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The west side shall be the great sea, from the south border as far as over against the entrance of Hamath. This is the west side.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So you shall divide this land to you according to the tribes of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall happen, that you shall divide it by lot for an inheritance to you and to the aliens who live among you, who shall father children among you; and they shall be to you as the native-born among the children of Israel; they shall have inheritance with you among the tribes of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall happen, that in what tribe the stranger lives, there you shall give him his inheritance, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now these are the names of the tribes: From the north end, beside the way of Hethlon to the entrance of Hamath, Hazar Enan at the border of Damascus, northward beside Hamath, (and they shall have their sides east and west), Dan, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Dan, from the east side to the west side, Asher, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Asher, from the east side even to the west side, Naphtali, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Naphtali, from the east side to the west side, Manasseh, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Manasseh, from the east side to the west side, Ephraim, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Ephraim, from the east side even to the west side, Reuben, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Reuben, from the east side to the west side, Judah, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Judah, from the east side to the west side, shall be the offering which you shall offer, twenty-five thousand reeds in width, and in length as one of the portions, from the east side to the west side: and the sanctuary shall be in the middle of it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The offering that you shall offer to Yahweh shall be twenty-five thousand reeds in length, and ten thousand in width.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For these, even for the priests, shall be the holy offering: toward the north twenty-five thousand in length, and toward the west ten thousand in width, and toward the east ten thousand in width, and toward the south twenty-five thousand in length: and the sanctuary of Yahweh shall be in the middle of it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall be for the priests who are sanctified of the sons of Zadok, who have kept my instruction, who didn’t go astray when the children of Israel went astray, as the Levites went astray.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall be to them an offering from the offering of the land, a thing most holy, by the border of the Levites.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Answerable to the border of the priests, the Levites shall have twenty-five thousand in length, and ten thousand in width: all the length shall be twenty-five thousand, and the width ten thousand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall sell none of it, nor exchange it, nor shall the first fruits of the land be alienated; for it is holy to Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The five thousand that are left in the width, in front of the twenty-five thousand, shall be for common use, for the city, for dwelling and for suburbs; and the city shall be in the middle of it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These shall be its measurements: the north side four thousand and five hundred, and the south side four thousand and five hundred, and on the east side four thousand and five hundred, and the west side four thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The city shall have suburbs: toward the north two hundred fifty, and toward the south two hundred fifty, and toward the east two hundred fifty, and toward the west two hundred fifty.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The remainder in the length, answerable to the holy offering, shall be ten thousand eastward, and ten thousand westward; and it shall be answerable to the holy offering; and its increase shall be for food to those who labor in the city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who labor in the city, out of all the tribes of Israel, shall cultivate it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the offering shall be a square of twenty-five thousand by twenty-five thousand: you shall offer it as a holy offering, with the possession of the city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The remainder shall be for the prince, on the one side and on the other of the holy offering and of the possession of the city; in front of the twenty-five thousand of the offering toward the east border, and westward in front of the twenty-five thousand toward the west border, answerable to the portions, it shall be for the prince: and the holy offering and the sanctuary of the house shall be in the middle of it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moreover from the possession of the Levites, and from the possession of the city, being in the middle of that which is the prince’s, between the border of Judah and the border of Benjamin, it shall be for the prince.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for the rest of the tribes: from the east side to the west side, Benjamin, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Benjamin, from the east side to the west side, Simeon, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Simeon, from the east side to the west side, Issachar, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Issachar, from the east side to the west side, Zebulun, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Zebulun, from the east side to the west side, Gad, one portion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the border of Gad, at the south side southward, the border shall be even from Tamar to the waters of Meribath Kadesh, to the brook, to the great sea.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the land which you shall divide by lot to the tribes of Israel for inheritance, and these are their several portions, says the Lord Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These are the exits of the city: On the north side four thousand and five hundred reeds by measure;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and the gates of the city shall be after the names of the tribes of Israel, three gates northward: the gate of Reuben, one; the gate of Judah, one; the gate of Levi, one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At the east side four thousand and five hundred reeds, and three gates: even the gate of Joseph, one; the gate of Benjamin, one; the gate of Dan, one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At the south side four thousand and five hundred reeds by measure, and three gates: the gate of Simeon, one; the gate of Issachar, one; the gate of Zebulun, one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At the west side four thousand and five hundred reeds, with their three gates: the gate of Gad, one; the gate of Asher, one; the gate of Naphtali, one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It shall be eighteen thousand reeds around: and the name of the city from that day shall be, Yahweh is there.
